spec.name: In The Dense Forest Between The Hills
spec.description: You are standing among tightly packed trees on a medium sized hill. The dense forest spreads out all around you, and the crowns of the old trees leave the hills in an unreal twilight illumination.

north.description: All you see are trees and hillsides.

east.description: All you see are trees and hillsides.

south.description: All you see are trees and hillsides.

extra_descs.description: The trees are mostly old beeches and oaks.
Hills rise up all around you, blocking your view of the terrain.
